arts.ttl: Tottenham 'decide against' 22-year-old transfer after Ange Postecoglou's firm warning to Daniel Levy
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly decide against a mid-season move for Ajax attacker Brian Brobbey as Ange Postecoglou fires a firm transfer warning to the board.

arts.ttl: Strasbourg retain interest in Porto’s Gonçalo Borges
arts.sum: Gonçalo Borges (23) had looked set to join RC Strasbourg Alsace during the summer window, however, he opted to remain with his formative club, Porto. Determined to establish himself as…

arts.ttl: Report: Leeds United boss Daniel Farke names three signings he would like seal in January
arts.sum: Leeds United are fighting for promotion, but they are yet to make a signing in the January transfer window. But Whites boss Daniel Farke has provided the clearest indication yet of the areas he wants to strengthen if any new names were to come in. arts.ttl: Preview: Porto vs. Santa Clara - prediction, team news, lineups
